question.question_text: How many total points will be scored in the NBA game between Dallas Mavericks and Portland Trail Blazers on 2026-03-27?
question.context: Dallas Mavericks (23-50) at Portland Trail Blazers (37-37). Regular season NBA game.

prediction.reasoning: Average NBA game totals hover around 225-230 points in the 2025-26 season. Dallas is a poor team (23-50) likely playing without motivation late in a lost season, which could mean reduced defensive intensity or effort. Portland is a bubble team at .500 fighting for playoff positioning, giving them motivation. Both teams have middling pace and scoring profiles. A game between a tanking team and a motivated mid-tier team could see slightly elevated scoring from Portland and reduced resistance from Dallas. Estimating around 228 total points, with typical variance of +/- 15-20 points covering most outcomes.
